title: Special Programs: Adult and Community Education
description: Conroe ISD offers adult and community education programs designed to serve learners beyond the traditional K–12 student population, including adults seeking basic skills, literacy support, or continuing education opportunities. These programs help community members gain knowledge and skills that can improve their daily lives, career prospects, and ability to support their children's learning. The policy outlines how the district organizes and delivers these services to the broader community.
